Video.summary: Watch this DIY video tutorial to learn How to make a Spring Wreath. Adding colorful spring wreaths to your home is a fabulous way to make your space blossom with very little effort. Follow along with this home decor craft tutorial to create a stunning and bright project. This DIY craft is easy to make, and you can use just about any fabric you would like. Get started on your own DIY wreath for the most cheerful of seasons!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath
FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Back to School Fun
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Back to School Fun

Video.summary: Subtle spring accents, like this Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower branch, can add some lovely touches to your home. This free flower craft idea shows you how to make small tissue paper flowers and attach them to a branch for a realistic-looking faux flower. Once you create this cute DIY flower craft, you can add them to a vase, hang them on the wall, or combine them with other floral ideas for a unique DIY bouquet. These tissue paper cherry blossoms make excellent springtime decorations!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower
FaveCrafts: Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: It's All About Color

Video.summary: What's up folks, for this Frog Food we are imagining Toya & Bella as Secret Agents in this moody, monochromatic vibe. So get ready for another Speed Paint and Commentary!

Image.alt: Digital Painting - Frog Food: Drawing Commentary - Do you Actually NEED an Art Style
Digital Painting - Frog Food: Drawing Commentary - Do you Actually NEED an Art Style

Video.summary: Watch this video tutorial to learn how to make a colorful Felt Flower Corsage Craft. Adding a chic and cute DIY corsage to your event can really make your quirky and crafty nature stand out. This craft tutorial shows you how to create felt flowers and combine then with a pipe cleaner to make a charming DIY corsage. This felt craft idea would be a fantastic wearable craft to make for bridal shower guests or the flower girl at your wedding.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Felt Flower Corsage Craft

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Felt Flower Corsage Craft
FaveCrafts: Felt Flower Corsage Craft

Video.summary: Now that we have all these Toy Mini Brands, let’s make a store to display them in… a store like Target!… in a Hidden Doll Room!!! Join us as we made the toy section of Target in this new video.

Video.summary: WAKANDA FOREVER!!! Today on My Froggy Stuff check out the One and Only Custom Disney Princess Black Panther Shuri Doll!! This is a One of a Kind Custom Doll made from a Princess Tiana Doll! Watch as we custom make Shuri's Fabulous outfit, Face paint, and Shuri's Full Wakanda Tech Lab PERFECT for any S.T.E.M. Loving techie!!

Video.summary: This is the ULTIMATE Disney Descendants Mashup of our Favorite Crafts inspired by one of our favorite movies!!!! This video is nearly 45 minutes of Fabsomeness!! From our One of a Kind custom Dolls like Dizzy and Uma to our Fabulous Dollhouses like Evie's 4 Hearts studio we've got you covered! Enjoy!
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: ULTIMATE Disney Descendants Mash Ups - Dizzy and Uma Dollhouses and More

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: ULTIMATE Disney Descendants Mash Ups - Dizzy and Uma Dollhouses and More
My Froggy Stuff: ULTIMATE Disney Descendants Mash Ups - Dizzy and Uma Dollhouses and More

Video.summary: Going on a trip? Need a gift tag? Looking for a cute purse accessory? This Personalized DIY Luggage Tag is the perfect craft that can serve a number of purposes. Not only is this the perfect die cut craft that you can completely personalize and make your own, but you can also complete this craft in less than an hour. If you really need a new luggage tag for a trip but don't want to run to the store and buy one, this craft video can show you how easy it is to make your own!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Personalized DIY Luggage Tag

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Personalized DIY Luggage Tag
FaveCrafts: Personalized DIY Luggage Tag
